metadata.description: Curated sources for mobile testing strategy, automation frameworks, and device lab practices.

platform_docs.name: Apple XCTest Documentation
platform_docs.relevance: Core testing framework for iOS apps and UI automation.

platform_docs.name: Android Testing Documentation
platform_docs.relevance: Official Android test strategy, unit, and UI testing guidance.

platform_docs.name: Espresso Documentation
platform_docs.relevance: Primary Android UI testing framework reference.

platform_docs.name: Android Macrobenchmark
platform_docs.relevance: Android performance benchmarking for startup/jank regressions.

platform_docs.name: Swift Testing Documentation
platform_docs.relevance: Modern Swift unit/integration testing framework (complements XCTest; UI tests still use XCUITest).

platform_docs.name: Jetpack Compose Testing
platform_docs.relevance: Compose UI testing APIs and best practices (semantics, test tags, idling).

automation_tools.name: Detox Documentation
automation_tools.relevance: End-to-end testing for React Native apps.

automation_tools.name: Maestro Documentation
automation_tools.relevance: Cross-platform mobile UI testing with YAML flows (smoke/regression breadth).

automation_tools.name: Patrol (Flutter E2E)
automation_tools.relevance: Flutter E2E testing framework built on top of integration_test.

device_labs.name: Firebase Test Lab
device_labs.relevance: Device lab for automated and exploratory mobile testing.

device_labs.name: AWS Device Farm
device_labs.relevance: Cloud device testing and CI integration.

device_labs.name: BrowserStack App Automate
device_labs.relevance: Device cloud for mobile automation and debugging.

device_labs.name: Bitrise Device Testing
device_labs.relevance: Mobile CI/CD and device testing workflows.
